notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Vargas strikes out swinging. Passed ball by catcher Keibert Ruiz. Miguel Vargas advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by catcher Keibert Ruiz.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. grounds out, shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

notableEvents.label: CJ Abrams pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: CJ Abrams strikes out swinging, catcher Drew Romo to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. singles on a line drive to left fielder Tanner Murray. James Wood to 3rd. Curtis Mead to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Drew Romo. James Wood scores. Curtis Mead to 3rd. Luis García Jr. to 2nd.
